meaning: adj.恐怖的,令人讨厌的,可怕的
examples: In a horrid silence, Mrs. Darling smelt the bowl.
When she brought her picture-book, he asked, "What horrid beasts have you there?"
"It is horrid, but I better, Becky; they might hear us, you know," and he shouted again.
This is probably the aftereffect of a horrid dinner party I went to last night.
Derick Wade and Caroline Mayer Just Checked Into The Hotel Horrid on Next Ave.
